creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
On 25/05/2011 15:01, Frederic Culot wrote:
> Hi Jase and Masahiro,
>
> thanks for submitting and reviewing the patch.
> I believe there is a small mistake regarding the p5-POE-Component-IRC dependency.
> Indeed, your patch states the 6.52 version is needed whereas the minimum version
> needed seems to be 6.68 as stated here:
>
> http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/HINRIK/POE-Component-Server-IRC-1.48/Makefile.PL
>
> Unfortunately the version of p5-POE-Component-IRC we have in ports is still 6.54,
> so we will have to wait for this dependency to be updated before committing your
> patch.
>
> Thanks,
> culot@

Hi Frederic,

You're looking at the requirements for POE-Component-Server-IRC v1.48 
which was released last night. The patch is for POE-Component-Server-IRC 
v1.47 which has a dependancy against p5-POE-Component-IRC v6.51.

Regards,

Jase.
